docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 76678760) TO PLAINTIFF KATZOFF & RIGGS LLP
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 76679343) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KATZOFF & RIGGS LLP
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-17-2025 CONTINUED TO FEB-18-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-07-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-18-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76678760) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KATZOFF & RIGGS LLP AS TO DEFENDANT SAHU, ANKIT , INDIVIDUALLY AND IN HIS CAPACITY AS THE TRUSTEE OF THE SAHU FAMILY TRUST DATED OCTOBER 15, 2007, FBO ANKIT SAHU AND PURVI A. SAHU SAHU, ANKUR , AN INDIVIDUAL SAHU BROTHERS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-17-2025 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-16-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-24-2025
